title: Fix bug podman reset to not remove $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR
body:
In some older systems, we point the temporary directory to /run/user/1000 which leads podman system reset to clear unrelated files under XDG_RUNTIME_DIR. This patch only removes TmpDir if it is not the same as the XDG_RUNTIME_DIR.
fix #4831 
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: We still need to remove the tmp dir, we just want to be more selective about what we're removing in it - only the files that Podman create, not anything else
